name: lmvs-headless-mcp
description: Static tool manifest for a future LMVideoStudio MCP server (v1 skeleton).

tools.name: validate
tools.description: Validate a project JSON document against the LMVS schema.

tools.name: preview
tools.description: Start a mockup preview render job for a project.

tools.name: bake
tools.description: Start a full-quality bake export job for a project.
